title: Senior Frontend Developer at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About OLX India Asia Pacific Associates:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India Asia Pacific Associates!
